# WhisperShortcut 7.7

## Installation

Download the latest build from [Releases](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases).

## Changes

### New: Configurable command prefix

You can now choose which character triggers in-chat commands. Default stays `/` for everyone, but if `/` is awkward on your keyboard layout (e.g. German Mac, where it requires `Shift+7`), you can switch to `>`, `:`, or `!` in **Settings → Chat → Window Behavior → Command prefix**. The chosen prefix applies everywhere — typing, autocomplete, Tab completion, and the welcome screen's command list. When `>` is chosen, autocomplete is suppressed for Markdown blockquotes (`> text`) so it doesn't get in the way of normal writing.
